item.description:
# CodexMate 0.0.13
- Fixed unread indicators so existing idle threads do not appear unread after a warm resume or subscription refresh. - Repaired legacy zero read markers when a previously watched idle thread is resumed with existing terminal activity. - Kept auto-review escalated commands in the running state instead of showing the wait-for-user-input status when no explicit user approval is needed. - Preserved explicit user-input and approval states for real `request_user_input`, plan replies, `request_approval`, and desktop approval prompts. - Added regression coverage for warm resume unread handling and auto-review command status detection.
